---
title: "Test"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    embed-resources: TRUE
    code-fold: true
    page-layout: full
    fig_caption: yes
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tippy)
```

This is a 
```{r echo = FALSE, results='asis'}
tippy("word.", tooltip = "Definition of word that pops up in a box upon hovering")
```
